heroBadge: Nationwide B2B Supply Chain for Animal Hospitals

hero.title: Clinician's Answer, MONSMECTA
hero.subtitle: A gut solution that meets the rigorous standards of on-site veterinary care. Verified and prescribed by Dr. James Hong.

values.title: MONSMECTA's 3 Core Promises
values.desc: We become a reliable benchmark for veterinary directors' clinical and managerial trust.
values.online_desc: We promise never to distribute to online malls, open markets, social commerce, or general offline pet shops. You can maintain prescription authority exclusively through animal hospitals.
values.price_desc: We guarantee a reasonable supply price, allowing directors to set the actual retail price autonomously. Overwhelming margin rates provide vitality to hospital management.
values.formula_desc: High-content blend of ultra-fine Montmorillonite and Bacillus subtilis quickly restores the intestinal mucosal barrier and creates explosive synergy with IV fluid therapy.

clinical.title: Evidence Proposed by Vets for Vets
clinical.card1_desc: Monsmecta's core LIQI ultra-fine process delivers overwhelming performance compared to conventional antidiarrheal raw materials.
clinical.card2_desc: Test results based on academic evidence from Prof. Lee Hu-jang's research team at Gyeongsang National University College of Veterinary Medicine.
clinical.card3_desc: DNJ produced by Bacillus subtilis MORI, the core strain of DNG-1000, shows inhibitory effects across multiple virus families.
clinical.card4_desc: Monsmecta is currently being validated through review meetings with veterinary experts.
clinical.card4_quote1: "Specifying viral adsorption is a key differentiator."
clinical.card4_quote1_author: Prof. Park Bong-kyun (Former Quarantine Director, Virology)
clinical.card4_quote2: "Particle size, moisture absorption, specific surface area... it has all the data veterinarians want."
clinical.card4_quote3: "It is excellent for relieving abdominal pain in puppies infected with parvovirus. It provides real help in the recovery of patients suffering from frequent vomiting and diarrhea."
clinical.card4_quote4: "I think this would be good for humans as well..."
clinical.card4_quote4_author: Prof. Hwa-young Youn (Former Prof. of Internal Medicine, SNU College of Vet Medicine · Former Head of SNU Animal Hospital Internal Medicine)
clinical.card4_note: Monsmecta's academic and advisory board consists of 5 or more veterinary medicine experts who are all graduates of Seoul National University College of Veterinary Medicine, thoroughly verifying clinical data and prescription criteria.
